rationale: Upload and download examples are realistic and use current APIs with platform-idiomatic async patterns and error callbacks, but no import statements appear in any platform's snippets, reducing extractability — a developer copying them needs to know which classes to import.
suggestions: Add import statements to all four platform code blocks (e.g., `import { FileRepository } from '@amityco/ts-sdk'` for TS).
Add a brief error-handling example showing what to display to the user when upload fails (network timeout, oversized file).
